content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.channels.imessage
FILE: cosmos/integration/channels/imessage.py (508 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos iMessage Channel Adapter
====================================

iMessage integration for the Cosmos swarm (macOS only).

Features:
- Direct messages
- Group chats
- Rich links
- Tapbacks (reactions)
- Attachments
- Read receipts
- Typing indicators

Uses macOS native APIs via AppleScript/JXA o

CLASSES:
- iMessageChannel(BaseChannel): iMessage channel adapter for macOS.

Uses:
- sqlite3 to read Messages database
-
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: async def send_message(self, recipient: str, text: str, media_path: Optional[str]=None, **kwargs) ->
  Methods: async def send_to_group(self, group_name: str, text: str, media_path: Optional[str]=None) -> bool
  Methods: async def get_recent_chats(self, limit: int=20) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def get_chat_history(self, chat_id: str, limit: int=50) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def get_contacts(self) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def start_new_chat(self, participants: List[str]) -> bool
